mapper.sql: ai.id, ai.meeting_id, ai.title, ai.description, ai.assignee, TO_CHAR(ai.due_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS due_date, ai.priority, ai.status, ai.work_request_no, ai.resolution_note, TO_CHAR(ai.resolved_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS resolved_at, TO_CHAR(m.meeting_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS meeting_date
mapper.select: SELECT FROM hkgn.daily_meeting_action_item ai JOIN hkgn.daily_production_meeting m ON m.id = ai.meeting_id WHERE ai.meeting_id = #{meetingId} ORDER BY CASE ai.priority WHEN 'HIGH' THEN 1 WHEN 'MEDIUM' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, ai.created_at DESC

SELECT FROM hkgn.daily_meeting_action_item ai JOIN hkgn.daily_production_meeting m ON m.id = ai.meeting_id WHERE ai.status IN ('OPEN', 'IN_PROGRESS') ORDER BY CASE ai.priority WHEN 'HIGH' THEN 1 WHEN 'MEDIUM' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, ai.due_date NULLS LAST, ai.created_at DESC
SELECT FROM hkgn.daily_meeting_action_item ai JOIN hkgn.daily_production_meeting m ON m.id = ai.meeting_id WHERE ai.id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE hkgn.daily_meeting_action_item SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, assignee = #{assignee}, due_date = TO_DATE(#{dueDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') NULL , priority = #{priority}, status = #{status}, work_request_no = #{workRequestNo}, resolution_note = #{resolutionNote}, resolved_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'DONE' AND resolved_at IS NULL THEN now() ELSE resolved_at END, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hkgn.daily_meeting_action_item WHERE status IN ('OPEN', 'IN_PROGRESS')
